action.reasoning: Observation: ViT frozen backbone got 0.7413. I have ~57 min left. Analysis: Can improve by fine-tuning last few ViT blocks with small LR + more memory. 10 epochs per task should take ~16 min. Decision: Write improved train_vit2.py with fine-tuning last 4 blocks, larger memory (8000), 15 epochs per task, and submit eval.
